# The Vault

> A free quiz that matches you with discounts, free tiers, and perks you
> actually qualify for — student deals, 21+ offers, community discounts
> (military, teacher, nurse, first responder, government), and
> free-for-everyone programs — ranked by estimated dollar value.

Answer five questions (age bracket, student status, communities, US state,
interests). Eligibility runs entirely client-side. Every offer links to its
official source page and shows the date it was last verified. Sports-betting
promos appear only for 21+ users in states with legal online betting, carry
a negative-expected-value warning, and count $0 toward the savings total.
